# Scenario Instructions

## Preferences

### Flow Mode
- Mode: Automatic (agent will run end-to-end and only pause when blocked)

### Source Control
- Source branch: main (user requested to remain on main)
- Working branch: main (no new branch will be created)
- Pending changes action: commit before upgrade starts (default)

## Technical Preferences
- Target framework: .NET 8.0 (user requested upgrade to modern .NET 8)

## Key Decisions Log
- 2026-05-06: User requested to stay on the 'main' branch and upgrade the solution to .NET 8.0 and fix all build errors.
